storyBeat: Heracles 是強壯的英雄 — 他必須做 12 件難事

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講海格力斯的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在海格力斯的故事裡：
🔑 hero = 英雄
🔑 strong = 強壯
🔑 task = 任務
🔑 brave = 勇敢

questions.sentence: Four more words — can you match them all?
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 lion = 獅子
🔑 beast = 野獸
🔑 gold = 黃金
🔑 river = 河

questions.sentence: Which one is a lion?
questions.question: Which one is a lion?
questions.explanationZh: 獅子的英文是 lion 🦁！故事裡有一隻超巨大的獅子，是海格力斯的第一個任務。

questions.sentence: Which emoji shows something strong?
questions.question: Which one shows strong?
questions.explanationZh: strong = 強壯 💪！海格力斯非常強壯，一個人就能舉起大公牛。

questions.sentence: Heracles was a brave hero who went on many tasks.
questions.sentenceZh: 海格力斯是一個勇敢的英雄，去完成了許多任務。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'a brave hero'?
options: a child hiding under a wooden table
an old woman resting by a warm fire
a strong man standing tall and ready to go
a small cat sleeping on a soft bed
optionsZh: 一位老婆婆坐在暖火旁休息
一個強壯的男人站得筆直、準備出發
questions.explanationZh: brave hero = 勇敢的英雄。海格力斯站得筆直、目光堅定——這就是「勇敢」的樣子！

storyBeat: 第一任務 — 尼米亞地區有一隻可怕的大獅子

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在海格力斯的故事裡：
🔑 wooden club = 木棍
🔑 golden deer = 金色的鹿
🔑 strong hero = 強壯的英雄
🔑 finish the task = 完成任務

questions.sentence: Heracles walked along the river every morning with his club.
questions.sentenceZh: 海格力斯每天早上帶著木棍沿著河走。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'walking along a river'?
options: a man climbing up a steep stone wall
two children playing in a dusty market
a woman cooking fish over a fire
a man walking beside a flowing stream
optionsZh: 一個男人爬上陡峭的石牆
兩個小孩在塵土飛揚的市集玩耍
一個男人走在流動的小河旁
questions.explanationZh: river = 河，句子說海格力斯沿著河走——圖中正好是一個人走在河旁邊。

questions.sentence: Which one is a deer?
questions.question: Which one is a deer?
questions.explanationZh: deer = 鹿 🦌！故事裡有一隻金色的鹿，是海格力斯的第三個任務。

questions.sentence: Yesterday morning, Heracles ___ his club and went to the river.
questions.sentenceZh: 昨天早上，海格力斯___他的木棍，走向了河邊。
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh: 「Yesterday morning」= 昨天早上，要用過去式「took」！take 的過去式是 took（不規則動詞）。

questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 club = 木棍
🔑 deer = 鹿
🔑 gold = 黃金
🔑 beast = 野獸

storyBeat: 他帶著弓和劍 — 走進黑森林

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 bow = 弓
🔑 sword = 劍
🔑 forest = 森林
🔑 dark = 黑暗
走進黑森林了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles took his bow and put a bag of long arrows on his back.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 拿起弓，把一袋長箭背在背上——準備好了，出發。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He also tied a sharp sword to his side with a thick leather belt.
questions.question: What did Heracles bring with him?
options: a soft pillow and a hat
a big pot of hot soup
a bow and a sharp sword
questions.explanationZh: 還用皮帶把一把利劍綁在腰上——「弓和鋒利的劍」就是他帶的武器。
questions.sentenceZh: 他還用厚皮帶把一把鋒利的劍繫在腰間。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He started up the hill alone, with no friend at his side.
questions.questionEn: Did anyone go with Heracles?
questions.explanationZh: 他一個人走上山，沒有朋友陪——「沒人陪」，答 No。他獨自面對那隻獅子。
questions.sentenceZh: 他一個人開始爬山，身邊沒有任何朋友。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon he walked into a dark forest where the tall trees blocked the sun.
questions.explanationZh: 他走進一片黑森林，高高的樹擋住了陽光——連白天都像黑夜一樣暗。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The forest was very quiet. No bird sang and no small animal moved.
questions.question: How did the forest sound?
questions.explanationZh: 沒有鳥叫、沒有動物動——「安靜沒有聲音」就是答案。這種安靜，有點可怕。
questions.sentenceZh: 森林裡靜得出奇，沒有鳥叫，也沒有小動物的聲音。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles stepped softly on the dry leaves and listened with care.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 輕輕踩在乾葉子上，豎起耳朵聽——他像一個有經驗的獵人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw big paw prints in the soft mud near a cold stream.
questions.question: What did Heracles find on the ground?
questions.explanationZh: 溪邊的軟泥上，有巨大的腳印——「巨大的動物腳印」就是答案。獅子走過的痕跡。
questions.sentenceZh: 他在一條冰冷小溪旁的軟泥上，看見了大大的爪印。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prints led up the hill, deeper into the trees.
questions.explanationZh: 腳印一路往山上去，越走越深——Heracles 跟著走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of place was the forest?
questions.question: What was the forest like?
questions.explanationZh: 高樹擋光 + 沒聲音 → 「又黑又安靜」。那個 🌑 就是森林的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 那片森林是個什麼樣的地方？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles followed the prints with a steady hand on his bow...
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 一手穩穩握著弓，跟著腳印走……奶奶說，這種走法，叫做「步步為營」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles took his bow and put a bag of long arrows on his back.
questions.question: What did Heracles carry on his back?
questions.explanationZh: 「a bag of long arrows on his back」——他背上背著一袋長箭。
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 拿起弓，把一袋長箭背在背上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He started up the hill alone, with no friend at his side.
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles go up the hill by himself?
questions.explanationZh: 「alone, with no friend」——一個人，沒有朋友，他獨自走上山，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他一個人開始爬山，身邊沒有任何朋友。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 dry leaves = 乾葉子 / paw prints = 腳印 / stream = 小溪 / deeper = 深處
森林場景詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The forest was very quiet. No bird sang and no small animal moved.
questions.question: Why was the forest so quiet?
options: the animals all stayed away in fear
the trees were too far apart
questions.explanationZh: 沒有鳥叫、沒有動物動——可能是因為大獅子在這裡，「動物全都嚇走了」！
questions.sentenceZh: 森林裡靜得出奇，沒有鳥叫，也沒有小動物的聲音。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw big paw prints in the soft mud near a cold stream.
questions.question: What did Heracles find near the stream?
options: huge animal tracks in the mud
optionsZh: 泥土裡巨大的動物蹤跡
questions.explanationZh: 在小溪旁的軟泥上，看見大大的腳印——「泥土裡的大腳印」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他在一條冰冷小溪旁的軟泥上，看見了大大的爪印。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prints led up the hill, deeper into the trees.
questions.questionEn: Did the footprints go up the hill?
questions.explanationZh: 「led up the hill」——腳印往山上走，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 腳印一路往山上去，越走越深。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Heracles act inside the dark, quiet forest?
questions.question: How did he act?
questions.explanationZh: 輕踩落葉 + 豎耳傾聽 → 「小心又警覺」。那個 🎯 就是他的態度。
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 在黑暗又安靜的森林裡是怎麼行動的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles followed the prints with a steady hand on his bow...
questions.questionEn: Was Heracles nervous while following the prints?
questions.explanationZh: 「a steady hand」——手很穩，穩定的人不緊張，答 No！他沉著追蹤。
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 一手穩穩握著弓，跟著腳印走……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He also tied a sharp sword to his side with a thick leather belt.
questions.question: How did Heracles carry his sword?
options: wrapped in a thick brown cloth
held tight in both of his hands
fastened at his waist by a belt
questions.explanationZh: 用皮帶把利劍繫在腰側——「用皮帶綁在腰側」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他還用厚皮帶把一把鋒利的劍繫在腰間。

storyBeat: 他看見獅子 — 射箭, 箭彈開

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 see = 看見
🔑 arrow = 箭
🔑 shoot = 射
🔑 bounce = 彈開
箭要射出去了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At the top of the hill, the trees opened up into a wide stone space.
questions.explanationZh: 山頂，樹林散開，出現一片寬闊的石頭空地——獅子就在那裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There, in front of a deep cave, the giant lion lay on warm rocks.
questions.question: Where was the lion?
options: resting on rocks near a cave
optionsZh: 在山洞旁的石頭上休息
questions.explanationZh: 獅子趴在洞口旁的石頭上——「在山洞旁的石頭上休息」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 就在一個深深的山洞前，那頭巨獅趴在溫暖的岩石上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Its yellow eyes opened, and it stared right back at Heracles.
questions.questionEn: Did the lion see Heracles?
questions.explanationZh: 獅子的黃眼睛張開，直盯著 Heracles 看——它看見他了，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 牠的黃眼睛睜開了，直直地盯著赫拉克勒斯。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles pulled an arrow from his bag and lifted his strong bow.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 抽出箭，舉起弓——瞄準，準備射。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He let the arrow fly. It hit the lion right in the chest.
questions.question: Where did the arrow hit the lion?
questions.explanationZh: 箭射出去，正中獅子胸口——「正中胸口」就是答案。一點都沒偏。
questions.sentenceZh: 他放箭，正中獅子胸口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the arrow did not go in. It bounced off and fell on the rocks.
questions.explanationZh: 可是箭沒射進去，彈開，掉在石頭上——毛皮太厚了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles shot two more arrows. Both of them bounced off too.
questions.question: What happened to all the arrows?
options: they got lost in the trees
questions.explanationZh: 他又射兩支，全部彈開——「全部都彈開了」就是答案。一支都沒用。
questions.sentenceZh: 赫拉克勒斯又射了兩箭，兩支都彈開了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion's skin was too thick. Arrows could not hurt it at all.
questions.explanationZh: 獅子的毛皮太厚，箭根本無法傷牠——這隻獅子真的不是普通的獅子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the lion react to the arrows?
questions.question: What was the lion like?
questions.explanationZh: 箭都彈開 + 毛皮太厚 → 「完全沒受傷」。那個 🛡️ 就是獅子的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子對那些箭的反應是什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles dropped his bow and reached for the sword at his side...
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 放下弓，伸手去拿身邊的劍……奶奶說，他還沒放棄，只是換一個辦法。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There, in front of a deep cave, the giant lion lay on warm rocks.
questions.question: What was the lion doing when Heracles found it?
options: resting in front of its cave
eating a big fish by a stream
questions.explanationZh: 趴在洞口前的石頭上——「在山洞前休息」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 就在一個深深的山洞前，那頭巨獅趴在溫暖的岩石上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Its yellow eyes opened, and it stared right back at Heracles.
questions.questionEn: Did the lion notice Heracles?
questions.explanationZh: 黃眼睛張開，直盯著 Heracles——牠發現他了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 牠的黃眼睛睜開了，直直地盯著赫拉克勒斯。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 hilltop = 山頂 / shoot = 射 / chest = 胸口 / bounce = 彈開
對戰的關鍵詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles shot two more arrows. Both of them bounced off too.
questions.question: What happened after Heracles shot all his arrows?
options: the lion ran away at last
none of the arrows worked at all
one arrow hurt the lion's ear
the lion stopped and sat still
optionsZh: 一支箭傷了獅子的耳朵
questions.explanationZh: 全部彈開——「沒有一支箭有用」就是正確答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 赫拉克勒斯又射了兩箭，兩支都彈開了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion's skin was too thick. Arrows could not hurt it at all.
questions.question: Why could arrows not hurt the lion?
options: the arrows were all too short
the skin was far too thick
questions.explanationZh: 「The lion's skin was too thick」——「皮太厚了」，所以箭傷不了牠！
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子的毛皮太厚，箭根本無法傷牠。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles dropped his bow and reached for the sword at his side...
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles stop trying after the arrows failed?
questions.explanationZh: 箭沒用，他換劍——沒有停下來放棄，答 No！他換了一個方法繼續。
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 放下弓，伸手去拿身邊的劍……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At the top of the hill, the trees opened up into a wide stone space.
questions.question: What was at the top of the hill?
options: 🪨 open rocks and a dark cave
optionsZh: 開闊的石頭空地和黑暗山洞
questions.explanationZh: 樹林散開，出現石頭空地和山洞——「開闊的石頭空地和黑暗山洞」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 山頂，樹林散開，出現一片寬闊的石頭空地。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He let the arrow fly. It hit the lion right in the chest.
questions.questionEn: Was Heracles a good shot with the bow?
questions.explanationZh: 箭射出去正中胸口——他瞄得很準，答 Yes！只是獅子皮太厚而已。
questions.sentenceZh: 他放箭，正中獅子胸口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles pulled an arrow from his bag and lifted his strong bow.
questions.question: What was Heracles doing when he saw the lion?
options: getting ready to shoot an arrow
running away as fast as he could
putting his sword on the ground
questions.explanationZh: 他抽出箭、舉起弓——「準備射箭」就是他看見獅子後做的事。
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 抽出箭，舉起弓——瞄準，準備射。

questions.sentence: The arrow bounced off.
questions.explanationZh: bounce off = 彈開。句子說箭打到獅子厚厚的皮，直接彈開——一點都沒傷到牠！
questions.sentenceZh: 箭彈開了。

questions.sentence: His skin is too thick.
questions.explanationZh: too thick = 太厚。故事裡就是因為獅子的皮太厚，弓箭和劍都沒有用——這句話解釋了為什麼！
questions.sentenceZh: 他的皮太厚了。

questions.sentence: Heracles is a very brave hero.
questions.answer: Heracles is a very brave hero.
accept: Heracles is a really brave hero.
Heracles was a very brave hero.
Heracles was a really brave hero.
He is a very brave hero.
He was a very brave hero.
questions.explanationZh: brave hero = 勇敢的英雄。Heracles 一個人走進黑森林，沒有朋友幫忙，這就是真正的勇敢！
questions.sentenceZh: 海格力斯是個非常勇敢的英雄。

questions.sentence: The lion's skin was too thick. Arrows could not hurt it at all.
questions.question: What does this tell us about the lion?
options: it was tired and hungry that day
its body could not be harmed by weapons
it was hiding inside the cave
it had never seen a person before
optionsZh: 牠的身體無法被武器傷到
questions.explanationZh: 箭射不穿、劍砍不進，說明這頭獅子的身體『無法被武器傷到』。這不是普通的獅子！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 swing = 砍
🔑 break = 斷
🔑 roar = 吼叫
🔑 jump = 跳
激烈的戰鬥！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles ran at the lion with his sword held up high.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 高舉著劍，衝向獅子——全力衝上去！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He swung the blade down with all his power, hitting the lion's back.
questions.question: How hard did Heracles hit the lion?
options: not at all, just a wave
questions.explanationZh: 用盡全力往下砍——「用盡全力」就是答案。沒有留力氣。
questions.sentenceZh: 他用盡全力把劍往獅子背上劈下去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sharp blade hit the thick skin and snapped into two pieces.
questions.questionEn: Did the sword stay whole?
questions.explanationZh: 利刃砍上厚毛皮，「啪！」一聲斷成兩半——劍斷了，答 No。毛皮比劍還硬！
questions.sentenceZh: 鋒利的劍碰到厚厚的皮，「咔」地斷成兩截。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles looked at the broken sword in his hand with wide eyes.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 瞪大眼睛，看著手裡斷掉的劍——他不敢相信。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion was not hurt at all. It only let out a loud, deep roar.
questions.question: What did the lion do after the sword broke?
questions.explanationZh: 獅子完全沒受傷，只發出一聲巨大的吼——「發出巨大吼聲」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子一點傷都沒有，只是發出了一聲震耳的低吼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The roar shook the trees and sent small stones rolling down the hill.
questions.explanationZh: 那一聲吼，震動樹木，小石頭滾下山——這隻獅子的吼聲，整個山都聽得到。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then it jumped at Heracles with its big mouth wide open.
questions.question: What did the lion do next?
options: called another lion to come help
rolled over to play in the grass
ate some grass under a shady tree
leaped at Heracles with open jaws
questions.explanationZh: 獅子張開大嘴撲向 Heracles——「張口撲向 Heracles」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 然後牠跳向赫拉克勒斯，嘴巴張得大大的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles jumped to the side. The lion's teeth missed him by a hair.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 往旁邊一跳，獅子的牙齒差一點點咬到——驚險！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How was the fight going so far for Heracles?
questions.question: How was the fight going?
questions.explanationZh: 箭彈開 + 劍斷 + 獅子撲咬 → 「非常糟，武器都壞了」。那個 ⚠️ 就是現在的狀況。
questions.sentenceZh: 到目前為止，這場打鬥對赫拉克勒斯來說進行得怎麼樣？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He threw the broken sword on the ground and clenched both his fists...
questions.explanationZh: 他把斷劍扔在地上，雙手握成拳頭……奶奶說，沒有武器的人才是真的勇敢。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles ran at the lion with his sword held up high.
questions.question: How did Heracles attack the lion with the sword?
options: he crept up slowly behind it
rushing at it with sword raised high
he threw the sword from far away
he hid and waited for it to come
questions.explanationZh: 「ran at the lion with his sword held up high」——高舉劍，直接衝上去！
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 高舉著劍，衝向獅子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sharp blade hit the thick skin and snapped into two pieces.
questions.questionEn: Did the sword break when it hit the lion?
questions.explanationZh: 「snapped into two pieces」——劍砍到厚皮，啪！斷成兩截，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 鋒利的劍碰到厚厚的皮，「咔」地斷成兩截。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 blade = 劍刃 / roar = 吼叫 / fist = 拳頭 / snap = 斷
這場激烈戰鬥的詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The roar shook the trees and sent small stones rolling down the hill.
questions.question: How powerful was the lion's roar?
options: soft like a small cat's sound
not loud at all to anyone
questions.explanationZh: 吼聲震動樹木、小石頭滾下山——「大到震動樹木、滾動石頭」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 那一聲吼，震動樹木，小石頭滾下山。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles jumped to the side. The lion's teeth missed him by a hair.
questions.question: How close did the lion come to biting Heracles?
options: it bit his hand and let go
it was far when it jumped
came very close but just missed
questions.explanationZh: 「missed him by a hair」——差一根頭髮的距離，「差一點點但沒咬到」！
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 往旁邊一跳，獅子的牙齒差一點點咬到。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion was not hurt at all. It only let out a loud, deep roar.
questions.questionEn: Did the sword hurt the lion?
questions.explanationZh: 「was not hurt at all」——一點傷都沒有，答 No！劍也奈何不了牠。
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子一點傷都沒有，只是發出了一聲震耳的低吼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He threw the broken sword on the ground and clenched both his fists...
questions.question: What did Heracles decide to do next?
options: 😴 stop and take a long rest
📜 ask a friend for new ideas
questions.explanationZh: 把斷劍扔掉、握緊拳頭——「赤手空拳繼續打」就是他的選擇。那個 ✊！
questions.sentenceZh: 他把斷劍扔在地上，雙手握成拳頭……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He swung the blade down with all his power, hitting the lion's back.
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles use his full strength to hit the lion?
questions.explanationZh: 「with all his power」——用盡全力砍下去，答 Yes！他拼盡全力了。
questions.sentenceZh: 他用盡全力把劍往獅子背上劈下去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles looked at the broken sword in his hand with wide eyes.
questions.question: How did Heracles feel when the sword broke?
questions.explanationZh: 「wide eyes」——睜大了眼睛，「震驚又驚訝」就是他的感受！
questions.sentenceZh: Heracles 瞪大眼睛，看著手裡斷掉的劍。

storyBeat: Heracles 決定 — 我要用我的雙手

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 hand = 手
🔑 fist = 拳頭
🔑 think = 想
🔑 decide = 決定
最後的決心！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles stood still and looked down at his two big hands.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 站著不動，低頭看著自己的兩隻大手——那雙手，現在是他唯一的武器。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He thought, "My bow is on the ground. My sword is broken."
questions.question: What was Heracles thinking about?
questions.explanationZh: 他想著：「弓在地上，劍斷了。」——「失去的武器」就是他想的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 他想：「弓掉在地上了，劍也斷了。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his arms were still strong, and his courage was still big.
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles give up?
questions.explanationZh: 可是手臂還是很強壯，勇氣也沒跑掉——沒有放棄，答 No。他還站著呢。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他的手臂還是很有力，他的勇氣也還是很大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He said to himself, "I will use my hands. That is all I need."
questions.explanationZh: 「我用我的手。我只需要這個。」——就這樣，他做了決定。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took a deep breath in and made both of his hands into fists.
questions.question: What did Heracles do with his hands?
options: let them hang at his sides
questions.explanationZh: 深吸一口氣，雙手緊握成拳頭——「緊緊握成拳頭」就是答案。準備好了。
questions.sentenceZh: 他深吸一口氣，把兩隻手握成拳頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion stepped closer, its tail moving slowly behind it.
questions.explanationZh: 獅子慢慢走近，尾巴緩緩擺動——牠也在等，等著撲過來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles did not move back. He did not look away from the lion.
questions.question: How did Heracles act facing the lion?
options: stood firm and kept eye contact
ran for the trees behind him
questions.explanationZh: 他沒後退，眼睛也沒離開獅子——「站穩，直視獅子」就是答案。這就是真正的勇敢。
questions.sentenceZh: 赫拉克勒斯沒有退後，沒有把目光從獅子身上移開。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His eyes were calm. His feet were steady. His mind was set.
questions.explanationZh: 眼神平靜、腳步穩定、心意已決——奶奶說，這三句話，就是「準備好了」的意思。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Heracles choose to do?
questions.question: What was his choice?
questions.explanationZh: 握拳 + 站穩 + 「我用我的手」 → 「赤手空拳對打」。那個 ✊ 就是他的選擇。
questions.sentenceZh: 赫拉克勒斯選擇做什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion leaped one more time. This time Heracles was ready...
questions.explanationZh: 獅子再次撲來，這次 Heracles 已經準備好了……奶奶說，這一刻，是整個故事最緊張的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He thought, "My bow is on the ground. My sword is broken."
questions.question: What was the problem for Heracles?
options: he forgot the way back home
his friends had all gone away
his bow and sword both could not help
questions.explanationZh: 弓在地上、劍斷了——「弓和劍都沒辦法幫他」就是他的問題！
questions.sentenceZh: 他想著：「弓掉在地上了，劍也斷了。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his arms were still strong, and his courage was still big.
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles still have his strength?
questions.explanationZh: 「his arms were still strong」——手臂還是很強壯，答 Yes！他的力氣沒有消失。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他的手臂還是很有力，他的勇氣也還是很大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 calm = 平靜 / steady = 穩定 / mind set = 決心 / closer = 接近
勇氣的語言！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles did not move back. He did not look away from the lion.
questions.question: What does it tell us about Heracles when he stood firm?
options: he was too tired to run away
no room behind him to step back
frozen with fear and unable to move
optionsZh: 顯示出真正深厚的勇氣
questions.explanationZh: 沒後退、眼睛沒離開獅子——這說明「他真的很勇敢」！
questions.sentenceZh: 赫拉克勒斯沒有退後，沒有把目光從獅子身上移開。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He said to himself, "I will use my hands. That is all I need."
questions.question: What did Heracles decide to use instead of weapons?
options: a heavy rock from the ground
questions.explanationZh: 「I will use my hands」——「只用他的赤手空拳」就是他的決定！
questions.sentenceZh: 「我用我的手。我只需要這個。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His eyes were calm. His feet were steady. His mind was set.
questions.questionEn: Was Heracles fully ready to face the lion?
questions.explanationZh: 眼神平靜、腳穩、心意已決——三樣都準備好了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 眼神平靜、腳步穩定、心意已決。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion stepped closer, its tail moving slowly behind it.
questions.question: What mood was the lion in?
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢走近 + 尾巴緩緩擺動——「準備好要攻擊了」。那個 😈 就是獅子的樣子！
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子慢慢走近，尾巴緩緩擺動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion leaped one more time. This time Heracles was ready...
questions.questionEn: Was Heracles prepared when the lion jumped again?
questions.explanationZh: 「This time Heracles was ready」——這次他已經準備好了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子再次撲來，這次 Heracles 已經準備好了……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took a deep breath in and made both of his hands into fists.
questions.question: What does making fists show about Heracles?
options: he was very cold and shaking
he wanted to go back to sleep
he was waving at the lion
questions.explanationZh: 深吸一口氣、雙手握拳——這顯示「他準備好要用力打了」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他深吸一口氣，把兩隻手握成拳頭。

storyBeat: 赤手勒住獅子 — 他贏了 + 穿上獅子毛皮

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 hold = 抱住
🔑 win = 贏
🔑 skin = 皮
🔑 coat = 披風
最後的勝利！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: As the lion jumped, Heracles met it with his strong arms wide open.
questions.explanationZh: 獅子撲過來，Heracles 張開雙臂迎上去——不是逃，是迎上去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He wrapped his arms around the lion's thick, warm neck and held tight.
questions.question: What part of the lion did Heracles grab?
questions.explanationZh: 他把手臂繞住獅子厚厚的脖子，緊緊抱住——「脖子周圍」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他把雙臂繞上獅子粗厚溫熱的脖子，緊緊抱住。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion shook and pulled, but Heracles did not let go.
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles release the lion?
questions.explanationZh: 獅子甩啊甩，Heracles 就是不放手——「沒放手」，答 No。一直抱著，不放。
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子拼命掙扎，但赫拉克勒斯就是不鬆手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They rolled over the rocks. Dust and dry leaves flew into the air.
questions.explanationZh: 他們在石頭上翻滾，塵土和乾葉子飛揚——這場搏鬥，沒有音效也讓人想到那些聲音。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Slowly, the lion grew weak in his arms. At last it stopped moving.
questions.question: What happened to the lion in the end?
options: it lost its strength and stopped
it ran away free into the hills
it turned into a grey stone
questions.explanationZh: 獅子慢慢沒力氣了，最後停下來——「力氣用盡，停下來」就是答案。Heracles 贏了。
questions.sentenceZh: 漸漸地，獅子在他懷裡越來越虛弱，最後停止了動作。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heracles stood up slowly. His chest moved up and down with deep breaths.
questions.explanationZh: Heracles 慢慢站起來，胸口隨著深呼吸起伏——他累了，但他贏了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took the lion's thick skin and made it into a warm coat for himself.
questions.question: What did Heracles do with the lion's skin?
options: wore it as a thick coat
questions.explanationZh: 他把獅子的厚毛皮做成披風穿上——「穿上當厚披風」就是答案。以後再也沒有箭能傷他。
questions.sentenceZh: 他把獅子厚厚的皮剝下來，做成一件厚外套披在身上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The skin was so thick that no sword or arrow could ever cut it.
questions.explanationZh: 這張毛皮，比任何劍和箭都還硬——他把它變成了自己的盔甲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the main lesson from tonight's story?
questions.question: What does the story teach?
options: 💪 think and use what you have
questions.explanationZh: 弓和劍都不行 → 改用雙手 → 「動腦，用你有的東西」。那個 💪 就是他的精神。
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事，主要想告訴我們什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One task was done. Eleven more were waiting. Heracles walked on...
questions.explanationZh: 一個任務完成了，還有十一個在等他——Heracles 繼續往前走……奶奶說，一步一步，這就是英雄的路。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He wrapped his arms around the lion's thick, warm neck and held tight.
questions.question: How did Heracles fight the lion in the end?
options: used a new sword from a friend
ran it off the edge of the hill
threw big stones at the lion
grabbed the lion around the neck
questions.explanationZh: 他把手臂繞住獅子的脖子緊緊抱住——「抓住獅子的脖子」就是他的方法！
questions.sentenceZh: 他把雙臂繞上獅子粗厚溫熱的脖子，緊緊抱住。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lion shook and pulled, but Heracles did not let go.
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles hold on to the lion?
questions.explanationZh: 「did not let go」——他沒有放手，答 Yes！一直緊緊抱著。
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子拼命掙扎，但赫拉克勒斯就是不鬆手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 roll = 翻滾 / dust = 塵土 / weak = 虛弱 / done = 完成
最終勝利的詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Slowly, the lion grew weak in his arms. At last it stopped moving.
questions.question: What happened to the lion in the fight?
options: it jumped over and ran free
it called for the king's help
it bit Heracles and got free
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢沒力氣、最後停下來——「越來越虛弱，停下來不動」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 漸漸地，獅子在他懷裡越來越虛弱，最後停止了動作。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took the lion's thick skin and made it into a warm coat for himself.
questions.question: Why did Heracles turn the lion's skin into a coat?
options: to sell it at a market
to give it away to the king
to cover himself from cold rain
questions.explanationZh: 毛皮比劍還硬——穿著它保護自己，「穿著它當強力保護」就是理由！
questions.sentenceZh: 他把獅子厚厚的皮剝下來，做成一件厚外套披在身上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The skin was so thick that no sword or arrow could ever cut it.
questions.questionEn: Would the lion-skin coat protect Heracles from arrows?
questions.explanationZh: 「no sword or arrow could ever cut it」——刀劍箭都切不透，穿著就能保護，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 這張毛皮，比任何劍和箭都還硬。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One task was done. Eleven more were waiting. Heracles walked on...
questions.question: How did Heracles feel after finishing the first task?
options: 😢 sad that more tasks were left
😴 too tired to move at all
💪 tired but ready to go on
questions.explanationZh: 完成一件、繼續往前走——「累了但準備繼續前進」就是他的樣子！那個 💪。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個任務完成了，還有十一個在等他——Heracles 繼續往前走……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: As the lion jumped, Heracles met it with his strong arms wide open.
questions.questionEn: Did Heracles run away when the lion jumped at him?
questions.explanationZh: 「met it with his strong arms wide open」——他張開雙臂迎上去，沒有逃，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 獅子撲過來，Heracles 張開雙臂迎上去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They rolled over the rocks. Dust and dry leaves flew into the air.
questions.question: What does the picture of rolling rocks and flying dust tell us?
options: the fight was gentle and slow
Heracles was just playing a game
the lion was not really trying
the fight was very wild and rough
questions.explanationZh: 在石頭上翻滾、塵土飛揚——「打鬥非常激烈又猛烈」就是這個畫面告訴我們的！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們在石頭上翻滾，塵土和乾葉子飛揚。
